description: Composition White round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with short sleeves, fabric tape on inseam of the neckline, and has graphic print on the chest with a metallic tinge Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Get to ready to don the vixen look with this AS Foxy t-shirt from nike. Let your T-shirt speak volumes of your evil side in style. Pair this tee with denims and flipflops for a great foxy look.
